channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Northeast US digs out from brutal storm that disrupted flights and canceled school
item.description: Neighbors, government workers and a powerful railroad snow-clearing machine nicknamed “Darth Vader” are scrambling to dig out the northeastern United ...

item.title: 2/23: CBS Evening News
item.description: Blizzard slams East Coast as major cities struggle with historic snowfall; Nuclear talks hang in the balance as Iran warns it's ready to fight.

item.title: Ukraine and Russia ravaged by 4 years of full-scale war without an ending in sight
item.description: After another year of talks, a war-ending deal remains frustratingly elusive.

item.title: WATCH: Massive fire triggers bridge collapse in Lincoln, Nebraska
item.description: The bridge is primarily used for freight trains. No word on the cause of the blaze.

item.title: WATCH: Russia cripples Ukraine’s energy system in the midst of a brutal winter
item.description: ABC News’ Ian Pannell reports on the unrelenting Russian attacks on Ukrainian soil and how it's left the young and vulnerable without water or heat du...

item.title: 2/23: The Takeout with Major Garrett
item.description: Shelter-in-place order issued for Americans in parts of Mexico after cartel leader killed; Newsom facing backlash for comments on SAT score.

item.title: What scientists will be looking for when government UFO files are released
item.description: Documents might help scientists shed light on unexplained phenomena and government secrets, experts said.

item.title: Russell Brand due in court on further rape, sexual assault charges
item.description: Russell Brand is due in court on rape and sexual assault charges, which were issued to him in December 2025.

item.title: Power outages reported, thousands of flights canceled as storm slams Northeast
item.description: More than 40 million people were under blizzard warnings along 700 miles of the East Coast from Maryland to Maine.

item.title: WATCH: Dog abandoned at Las Vegas Airport finds forever home
item.description: ABC News' Danny New reports on the heartbreaking story that finished with a happy ending for a 2-year-old goldendoodle who found his forever home.

item.title: As Ukraine war enters year 5, Zelenskyy, Kremlin agree: Russia falling short
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy marked the start of the fifth year of the Ukraine war​ by saying Russia has failed to achieve its goals — and ...

item.title: For Northeast blizzard, everything was just right to roll up a monster snowfall
EU fails to pass new sanctions targeting Russia after Hungary objects
